title: Understand: photosynthesis in organisms
description: Check your understanding of photosynthesis in organisms in this set of free practice questions aligned to NGSS standards.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How does energy change form during the process of photosynthesis?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Light energy is converted to chemical energy.
Chemical energy is converted to light energy.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which form of energy do plants capture in order to carry out photosynthesis?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Photosynthesis generates which form of energy for use by the plant?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which table correctly shows the inputs and outputs of photosynthesis?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content:
Inputs | Outputs
- | -
carbon dioxide | oxygen
water | sugars

Inputs | Outputs
- | -
sugars | oxygen
water | carbon dioxide

Inputs | Outputs
- | -
sugars | water
oxygen| carbon dioxide

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these are inputs to photosynthesis?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which of these are outputs of photosynthesis?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which of these best describes what happens to the sugars made during photosynthesis?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: The sugars are used for energy.
The sugars are released into the air.
The sugars are used for growth.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these best describes what happens to the sugars made by a plant during photosynthesis?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: The sugars help build up parts of the plant’s cells.
The sugars are used for energy within the plant’s cells.
The sugars are passed through the plant’s roots and into the soil.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these best describes what happens to the sugars made by algae during photosynthesis?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Some of the sugars are used for energy and growth.
Some of the sugars are stored for later use.
Some of the sugars are released into the air.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Where does photosynthesis occur in a plant?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Where does photosynthesis occur in a plant?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Photosynthesis occurs primarily in root cells.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the word or phrase that best completes the sentence.**

>In plants, photosynthesis occurs primarily in \_\_\_\_\_\_.

[[☃ radio 1]]
